code:
core._color_enabled = Dobot.PORT_GP2
device.set_color(enable=True, port=Dobot.PORT_GP2)


# --- SCRIPT START ---
while True:
  sync_move_named("nyoverbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  while (ir_detected("GP4")) == False:
    script_conveyor(1, 1, 0)
  sleep(0.5)
  script_conveyor(0, 1, 0)
  sync_move_named("nyoverbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  sync_move_named("nybelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  core.set_vacuum(True)
  sync_move_named("nyoverbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  sync_move_named("Color 2", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  sleep(2)
  if (device.get_color(port=Dobot.PORT_GP2)[0] == 1):
    sync_move_named("nyoverbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
    sync_move_named("Belt2", 0, 0, 0, 0)
    core.set_vacuum(False)
  elif (device.get_color(port=Dobot.PORT_GP2)[1] == 1):
    sync_move_named("nyoverbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
    sync_move_named("Belt2", 0, 0, 0, 0)
    core.set_vacuum(False)
    sync_move_named("overbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  elif (device.get_color(port=Dobot.PORT_GP2)[2] == 1):
    sync_move_named("nyoverbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
    sync_move_named("Belt2", 0, 0, 0, 0)
    core.set_vacuum(False)
    sync_move_named("nyoverbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  else:
    sync_move_named("Yellow først", 0, 0, 0, 0)
    sync_move_named("Yello 2", 0, 0, 0, 0)
    core.set_vacuum(False)
